message:
feat(tx): require commit receipts for rollback instead of assuming all steps committed

Add mission_tx_rollback_commit_report() deriving the rollback
compensation surface from actual commit receipts rather than the
synthetic all-committed assumption. Falls back to synthetic report
only for already-committed contracts without receipts. Rejects
non-committed contracts lacking receipts and mismatched receipt IDs.

Enrich TxReceipt with phase, tx_id, plan_id, step_id, outcome, and
decision_path fields. Update reconstruct_tx_resume_state to use
receipt-derived committed step IDs. Update all three rollback
surfaces (MCP, robot, CLI) with identical receipt-aware logic.

Add 6 tests covering receipt roundtrip, partial-commit rollback,
rejection cases, and synthetic fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
